changes: OpenClaw shipped stable v2026.4.22 on 2026-04-23 13:56 UTC, keeping the category anchor on a near-daily release cadence.
Hermes Agent shipped v2026.4.23 on 2026-04-23 22:32 UTC and reached roughly 113.9k stars in the 2026-04-24 scan.
HiClaw published v1.1.0-rc.1 on 2026-04-23 15:07 UTC, adding another fresh signal from the orchestration lane.
AstrBot shipped v4.23.5 and SwarmClaw shipped v1.5.68 plus v1.5.69 on 2026-04-23, while the rest of the set mostly showed routine growth and another PicoClaw nightly build.
whyItMatters: OpenClaw and Hermes both moved in the same window, so this run shows live momentum from both the core reference and the strongest learning-loop adjacent benchmark.
Multiple orchestration and platform-style competitors also shipped, confirming ecosystem activity without forcing a new taxonomy.
The durable strategic read still holds: OpenClaw sets pace, Hermes strengthens the learning-loop branch, and the broader field remains active without a category break.
